positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for zelda_positive.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u17,axiom,
    zelda != sony).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    nintendo != sony).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    zelda != nintendo).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define sells_million(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define on_top10(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define japanese_company(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define created(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for zelda_negative.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for zelda_negative.tptp
3. ! [X0] : (sells_million(X0) => on_top10(X0)) [input(axiom)]
4. sells_million(zelda) [input(axiom)]
6. on_top10(zelda) [input(conjecture)]
7. ~on_top10(zelda) [negated conjecture 6]
8. ~on_top10(zelda) [flattening 7]
13. ! [X0] : (on_top10(X0) | ~sells_million(X0)) [ennf transformation 3]
14. ~sells_million(X0) | on_top10(X0) [cnf transformation 13]
15. sells_million(zelda) [cnf transformation 4]
19. ~on_top10(zelda) [cnf transformation 8]
20. on_top10(zelda) [resolution 14,15]
21. $false [forward subsumption resolution 20,19]
% SZS output end Proof for zelda_negative.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
